Description: Customers who purchase frequently and in large amounts. High credit limit with moderate full-payment rate. Low cash advance usage -- prefer to spend on goods/services.
Top_Strategy: Offer premium rewards cards with cashback on purchases (travel, dining, shopping).

Description: The majority segment. Moderate balance, purchases, and payments. No extreme behavior in any dimension. Reliable but not highly engaged customers.
Top_Strategy: Send engagement campaigns: spend X get Y bonus points.

Description: Customers heavily dependent on cash advances. Carry the highest balance and rarely pay in full (3%). High financial risk -- potential default candidates.
Top_Strategy: Flag for financial risk monitoring -- high probability of default.
